REGIME — Risk-on, tech led, cyclicals faded, breadth narrowing.

INDICES — VIX 18.2 up. QQQ +1.40%, SPY +0.79%, IWM +0.25%, DIA -0.16%. Large caps beat small. Gold -1.04%.

SECTORS — XLK +1.60%, XLY +1.49%, XLF +0.75%, XLC +0.69%, XLRE -0.05%, XLE -0.34%, XLP -0.50%, XLV -0.71%, XLU -0.97%, XLB -1.21%, XLI -1.25%. MSOS +6.70%, WCLD +5.85% topped; XHB -2.74%, GDX -2.96% bottomed.

THE 7s — Software +4.66%, Cloud +2.79%, Mag +2.68%, New Staples +2.37%, Toll Road +1.69%, Insurance +1.23%, Semi +1.13%, Bank +0.41%, Medtech +0.10%, New Metals +0.00%, Energy -0.09%, Defense -0.37%, Health -0.64%, Power -0.80%, Old Staples -0.95%, Buildout -1.11%, Freight -1.30%, Old Metals -1.35%, Housing -1.37%, Fab -1.65%, Industrial -2.11%. NOW strongest in Software; weakest unnamed in Industrial.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, CME hold 100%. Hawk 6 (Cook,Hammack,Kashkari,Logan,Barkin,Goolsbee), neutral 5 (Powell,Williams,Barr,Jefferson,Paulson), dove 4 (Bowman,Miran,Waller,Daly). USD stress 54/100 elevated, CP-Tbill 95th percentile most stressed. TED 0.09%.

SIGNALS — Greed 60.9. TSLA +7.4% Consumer Discretionary, NOW +7.7% Software, NET +?% Cloud. 20d momentum: Semi +24.66% best sector, Fab -1.65% worst basket. TSLA surged on AI5 chip completion.

WATCH — THD -1.60% vol 13.9x; ASML -2.41% vol 2.4x; LIT -1.13% vol 3.9x. Flag vol spikes for reversal risks.
